'''''Ewoks'' 13''' is the thirteenth issue of [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|Marvel's ''Ewoks'']] series of comic books. It was published under the [[Marvel Comics]] [[Star Comics]] imprint on [[February 3]], [[1987]] with a cover date of May 1987. It is split into the three stories ''The Black Cavern'', ''Risky Business'', and ''Trapped in the Cavern''.
